hero.subtitle: Snap a photo of your receipt — FinVision does the rest. The first AI bot that tracks every expense without a single tap.
hero.note: Already in Telegram · No app install needed

pain.label: You're not alone
pain.title: Money disappears,
pain.subtitle: Most people quit expense tracking within a week. Not because they're lazy — but because it's too much friction.
pain.flip_hint: ↻ Click a card to see the solution
pain.c1_text: The month ends, your balance is low, and you have no idea what happened. Numbers just vanish.
pain.c1_fix: FinVision automatically records every expense from a receipt photo. Monthly report in one message. No manual input — ever.
pain.c2_title: Manual entry is too much work
pain.c2_text: You opened the app, saw the input form, closed it. Sound familiar? 80% of people who 'track expenses' do this.
pain.c2_fix: One photo instead of a ten-field form. The whole process takes 3 seconds. The bot handles everything else.
pain.c3_text: CoinKeeper, Excel spreadsheet, Notes app. None of them lasted more than three days.
pain.c3_fix: FinVision works in Telegram — where you already are. No new app to install. Just a chat with a bot.
pain.solution: FinVision removes the main obstacle — manual data entry.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Three steps
how.s1_text: Any receipt, invoice, or price tag. Just send a photo to the Telegram bot.
how.s2_text: Gemma 4 extracts the data. Qwen 3.5 assigns the category. No input from you.
how.s3_text: Trends, anomalies, savings advice — ready in the next message.
how.note: Also works with text: 'spent $20 on coffee'

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need,
features.subtitle: Click a card to learn more about each feature
features.f1_text: Receipt photo → structured data in seconds. Store, items, amount, currency — no typing.
features.f1_sub: Store · items · amount · currency · date — no manual input
features.f1_more: Vision Agent powered by Gemma 4 31B recognises text, numbers and structure with 85–95% accuracy. Supports receipts in 6 languages, blurry photos and low light.
features.f2_text: 19 categories, 60+ subcategories. AI assigns the right category for every expense.
features.f2_more: CategoryAgent matches expenses against a tree of 19 root and 60+ child categories. If confidence is below 70%, the bot suggests 3 options to choose from.
features.f3_text: Trends, anomalies, forecasts and personal savings tips every month.
features.f3_more: AnalyticsAgent compares periods, finds anomalies and gives concrete advice. Month-end forecast based on current spending pace.
features.f4_text: AI runs locally on your server. Your data never reaches Google or OpenAI.
features.f4_more: Gemma 4 and Qwen 3.5 are deployed locally. No API calls to OpenAI or Google by default. Cloud fallback only if the local server is unavailable.
features.f5_text: Russian, English, Chinese, Kyrgyz, French, Portuguese. Language is auto-detected.
features.f5_more: All messages, categories, reports and buttons are in the user's language. No setup needed — we detect language from Telegram. 30 currencies with regional sorting.
features.f6_text: Sent the same receipt twice? The bot detects it and skips the duplicate entry.
features.f6_more: Each receipt gets a perceptual hash (pHash). When a new receipt is uploaded, Hamming distance is calculated. ≥95% match triggers a duplicate warning.
features.f7_text: Where, with whom, what for. A full behavioural profile of your spending habits.
features.f7_more: 112 tags in 15 groups: location, company, occasion, mood, store type, habits. The admin panel shows a tag matrix and behavioural insights.
features.f8_text: No separate app to install. Telegram already has 900 million users worldwide.
features.f8_more: Telegram is available on iOS, Android, Windows, Mac, Linux and Web. Chat history syncs across devices. Your expenses — always at hand.

ai.label: Technology
ai.title: Not one AI —
ai.subtitle: Each agent is optimised for one specific task. That means more precision, faster results, and better reliability than a single general model.
ai.a1_task: Reads receipt photos, extracts structured data
ai.a2_task: Assigns the expense category from 19 options
ai.a4_task: Real-time protection against attacks and prompt injection
ai.a5_task: Deep analysis, trends, anomalies, personal spending advice
ai.privacy_text: Core agents run on local models (LM Studio + Ollama). Cloud fallback only activates when local models are unavailable.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Start free. No credit card. Cancel anytime.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.q1: How is FinVision different from other expense apps?
faq.a1: The key difference is receipt photo input instead of manual entry. None of the apps with 50M+ downloads can recognise receipts using local AI. FinVision runs directly in Telegram — no separate app required.
faq.q2: How accurate is the receipt recognition?
faq.a2: The Vision Agent (Gemma 4 31B) achieves 85–95% accuracy on standard receipts. If confidence falls below the threshold, the bot asks for confirmation. You can always correct the category with a single tap.
faq.a3: Yes. By default, AI runs locally — data never leaves the server and is never sent to OpenAI or Google. Cloud fallback is only used when local models are unavailable.
faq.q4: Do I need to install anything besides Telegram?
faq.a4: No. FinVision is a regular Telegram bot. Find @FinVision_AI_bot in search and press Start. Telegram is already on your device.
faq.q5: What happens after the free trial?
faq.a5: After 60 days you can choose a monthly ($2.50) or annual ($26.40) plan. There's a 7-day grace period — the bot keeps working. Without a plan, you keep access to history but new expenses are paused.
faq.q6: Can I add expenses as text, without a photo?
faq.a6: Yes. Write 'spent $20 on coffee' — the Intent Agent recognises your intent and creates the record automatically. Free-text input works in all 6 supported languages.

cta.title: Start tracking your money
cta.subtitle: 60 days free. No credit card. Already in Telegram.
